reference: I have been having really bad lower abdominal pains, and when I sneeze, I experience rather sharp pains in the lower left side. Sometimes during the day, I also experience sharp pains in my lower abdomen; they are really painful and just shoot through my lower abdomen. I really don't know what to make of this. I am female and twenty years old.
text: I have been having really bad lower abdominal pains, and when I sneeze, I experience rather sharp pains in the lower left side. Sometimes during the day, I also experience sharp pains in my lower abdomen. They are really painful and just shoot through my lower abdomen. I really don't know what to make of this. I am female and twenty years old.
